title: geraniospermum chelidonium
intro: Geraniospermum chelidonium, also known as Celandine, is a perennial plant belonging to the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and red sap. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Geraniospermum chelidonium include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Celandine often involve using the plant's roots or rhizomes to create tinctures, infusions, or ointments that can be applied topically or ingested as a supplement.
